title: Apply to renew a Northern Ireland plant health label (NIPHL) scheme authorisation
body: "To use this service you must already be authorised to use Northern Ireland plant health labels (NIPHL).   We’ll ask you to provide:    your NIPHL scheme authorisation number (if you know it)  the trading name of your business  the contact details of your business the name of the person responsible for your businesses’ NIPHL scheme authorisation   You must renew your authorisation annually.  Start now   Find out more about the Northern Ireland plant health label (NIPHL) scheme.  Get help   For help using this service, email plantpassportregistration@apha.gov.uk  "
